Techno Brain Recognized As One Of The Firms Pioneering Africa’s Integration
May 29, 2024

6 April, 2018 — Techno Brain is one among the African businesses that are playing a critical role in driving economic integration in the continent. According to a report by The Boston Consulting Group (BCG), Pioneering One Africa: African Corporations Trail-Blazing Across the Continent, the companies name have long overcome the geographic, geopolitical, transportation and infrastructure barriers that have restricted economic integration in African nations.

With a unique focus on Africa, Techno Brain has for long delivered technological solutions tailor-made to face the continent’s unique challenges.

“When we started in 1997, we realized that there were opportunities for us to fill the gap left by larger companies in the industry, where they were lacking a credible IT company to run operations,” states Mr. Manoj Shanker, CEO, Techno Brain.

“It has been a long journey during the past 20 years, but we are incredibly proud of the position we are in with our committed staff with thanks to the education, innovation and solutions that have contributed to achieving a shared goal.” Shanker adds.

Techno Brain has delivered groundbreaking solutions across a wide range of sectors including financial management, tax and customs, identification business, training, outsourcing, vendor centric products and solutions that have led to focused work with Microsoft and Oracle.

The company has been recognized by winning awards across the globe and as the leader in automating Governments across Africa. The Company is the first in the region to develop solutions like Automated Finger Print Identification System for Police departments that increases criminal tracking agencies, Revenue Managements Systems which help local governments to electronically collect and manage revenues, Border Control Systems, helping border control authorities ensure national security and many more solutions.

In 2014, Techno Brain was ranked second fastest growing Technology Company in Africa by Deloitte’s Fast 500 technology company survey in 2014. In addition, it is the only African company with a CMMI Level 5 appraisal standing in unique position to deliver the best products and solutions to organizations.

Techno Brain continues to expand steadily, servicing customers in 33 countries worldwide with an employee count of more than 1,200, spread out across Africa, India, UAE, UK and US.
